THE COURT OVERRULED THE DEMURRER AS TO THE SUFFICIENCY OF THE ALLEGATIONS WITH RESPECT TO THE EMPLOYER-EMPLOYEE RELATIONSHIP BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT JELANI II. AS TO THE DEMURRER CHALLENGING THE SUFFICIENCY OF THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION BUSINESS & PROFESSIONS CODE 17200 CLAIM. AFTER THE HEARING, THE COURT SENT ALL COUNSEL AN EMAIL REQUESTING FURTHER BRIEFING. THE MOTION IS CONTINUED IN DEPT. 21 ON SEP-19-2014 AT 3:00 PM FOR FURTHER HEARING ON THE DEMURRER AS TO THE SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION.
